violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen by the fryolator and the ware washing area were blocked by containers in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. containers were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Various deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the deli display cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The ceiling in the food preparation area was observed to be leaking into containers above a food preparation table. PIC moved and sanitized all equipment from the potential area of contamination and during time of inspection. Establishment shall not use the area until the leak and ceiling are repaired. Proof of repair is to be sent to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The floor tiles in the kitchen by the front prep area were observed loose and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a pan in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Pan was removed from hand sink at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Fly tape was observed in several areas throughout the establishment and were observed with dead or trapped insects. Establishment is to remove fly trapping devices and cease the practice of using such devices for control of pests. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The ceiling in the food preparation area was observed to be leaking into containers above a food preparation table. PIC moved and sanitized all equipment from the potential area of contamination and during time of inspection. Establishment shall not use the area until the leak and ceiling are repaired. Proof of repair is to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The walk-in cooler condenser was observed to be leaking into a container with food items stored below. PIC moved food items to other location. Establishment shall not store any food below the condenser until the leak is repaired and proof of repair is provided to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The enclosure for the garbage receptacle was observed with organic and in-organic debris surrounding the receptacle. Garbage receptacle enclosures shall be kept free of excess debris to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Establishment is to work with property management to removed excess debris from enclosure area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024
The floor tiles in the kitchen by the front prep area were observed loose and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by container. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Bowls are being used as scoops. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The floor in the dish area area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
